unit.name: Self-attention as fuzzy key-value lookup
unit.description: Introduces self-attention conceptually and mathematically as a soft lookup over keys and values generated from each token.
unit.summary: Attention is framed as a fuzzy lookup in a key-value store: instead of exactly matching one key, a query softly matches all keys, producing a weighted combination of values [ts=722s] [ts=768s]. The lecture then instantiates this for self-attention over a sentence, where every token embedding is transformed into a query, key, and value using learned matrices Q, K, and V [ts=912s] [ts=947s]. The attention score e_ij is the dot product between token i's query and token j's key, the weights are normalized with a softmax, and each output vector is the weighted sum of value vectors over the sequence [ts=986s] [ts=1010s] [ts=1033s].

key_points.text: Attention can be viewed as a fuzzy lookup in a key-value store rather than an exact dictionary lookup.
Each token embedding x_i is transformed into a query q_i, key k_i, and value v_i by learned matrices Q, K, and V.
The compatibility score e_ij is computed as the dot product q_i^T k_j.
The attention weight alpha_ij is the softmax-normalized version of e_ij over all positions j.
The output o_i for token i is a weighted sum of all value vectors v_j using weights alpha_ij.
Whether a token attends strongly to itself is learned through Q and K rather than hard-coded.

unit_summary_for_generation: Attention is framed as a fuzzy lookup in a key-value store: instead of exactly matching one key, a query softly matches all keys, producing a weighted combination of values [ts=722s] [ts=768s]. The lecture then instantiates this for self-attention over a sentence, where every token embedding is transformed into a query, key, and value using learned matrices Q, K, and V [ts=912s] [ts=947s]. The attention score e_ij is the dot product between token i's query and token j's key, the weights are normalized with a softmax, and each output vector is the weighted sum of value vectors over the sequence [ts=986s] [ts=1010s] [ts=1033s].

kp_catalog.name: Self-attention
kp_catalog.description: Self-attention applies attention within one set of vectors by projecting each input into a query, key, and value so every element can mix information from the whole set. Each token can gather information from every token in the sequence in a single parallel operation, rather than relying on stepwise recurrence.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because self-attention formalizes how self-attention applies attention within one set of vectors by projecting each input into a query, key, and value so every element can mix information from the whole set, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: Key-query-value self-attention equations
kp_catalog.description: Token embeddings are projected into queries, keys, and values; dot-product scores are softmax-normalized and used to compute weighted sums of value vectors.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because key-query-value self-attention equations formalizes how token embeddings are projected into queries, keys, and values; dot-product scores are softmax-normalized and used to compute weighted sums of value vectors, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.
